results.description:
A Magical Murder, a Grumpy Cat, and a Whole Lot of Snark

Being accused of murder was bad enough. Becoming a witch by accident? Even worse.

My name is Tawny Bigford, and I just became the new Town Witch by mistake. When I found my landlady dead and got blamed for her murder, her feline supervisor—a talking cat named Mr. Fluffikins—appointed me as her magical replacement. Now I've been forcibly recruited to the Paranormal Temp Agency and must solve the crime before I end up next.

I'm not ready to be a witch. I'm definitely not ready for untamed powers, a bossy familiar, or a town full of secrets. But with help from my sarcastic feline mentor, I'll fake it until I can figure it out... or die trying.

If you enjoy clean paranormal mysteries, witchy misadventures, and a hefty dose of feline side-eye, you'll love the start of this spellbinding series.

Start reading now and dive into a funny cozy mystery with a talking cat, chaotic spells, and one seriously enchanted mess.
